original_query: with inv as (select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy        ,stdev,mean, case mean when 0 then null else stdev/mean end cov  from(select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy             ,stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) stdev,avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) mean       from inventory           ,item           ,warehouse           ,date_dim       where inv_item_sk = i_item_sk         and inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk         and inv_date_sk = d_date_sk         and d_year =2001         and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Sports')         and i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 and 100         and inv_quantity_on_hand between 30 and 230       group by w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy) foo  where case mean when 0 then 0 else stdev/mean end > 1) select inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean, inv1.cov         ,inv2.w_warehouse_sk,inv2.i_item_sk,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov from inv inv1,inv inv2 where inv1.i_item_sk = inv2.i_item_sk   and inv1.w_warehouse_sk =  inv2.w_warehouse_sk   and inv1.d_moy=1   and inv2.d_moy=1+1 order by inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean,inv1.cov         ,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov ;
rewritten_query: with inv as (select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy        ,stdev,mean, case mean when 0 then null else stdev/mean end cov  from(select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy             ,stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) stdev,avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) mean       from inventory           ,item           ,warehouse           ,date_dim       where inv_item_sk = i_item_sk         and inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk         and inv_date_sk = d_date_sk         and d_year =2001         and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Sports')         and i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 and 100         and inv_quantity_on_hand between 30 and 230       group by w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy) foo  where case mean when 0 then 0 else stdev/mean end > 1) select inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean, inv1.cov         ,inv2.w_warehouse_sk,inv2.i_item_sk,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov from inv inv1,inv inv2 where inv1.i_item_sk = inv2.i_item_sk   and inv1.w_warehouse_sk =  inv2.w_warehouse_sk   and inv1.d_moy=1   and inv2.d_moy=1+1 order by inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean,inv1.cov         ,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov ;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Pre-filter d_moy in the CTE to only include months 1 and 2 since the main query only uses these months, reducing the amount of data processed in the GroupAggregate operation.
Replace the complex WHERE clause with CASE statement by using a HAVING clause that directly checks if mean is not zero and cov > 1, simplifying the filter logic.
Convert the implicit joins in the original query to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially improved query planning.
Replace the calculation 1+1 with the constant 2 in the condition inv2.d_moy = 1+1.
